subject: RFQ for Concrete
body:
Dear Saudi Basic Industries Corp (SABIC),

We are requesting a quotation for the following items:

- Concrete: 4 units
- Cement: As per requirement

Please provide your best competitive pricing and delivery timeline.

This is an official procurement request. We look forward to your prompt response.

Best regards,
Procurement Team
